overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a medieval gothic great hall with vaulted wooden ceilings and tall arched windows. Students sit at wooden tables while a central character in dark robes stands in the aisle, viewed from a static third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: stationary third-person view observing the great hall interior from behind the central character

notable_agents.action: standing still in the center aisle wearing dark robes
student sitting at wooden table reading a book

entered.detail: high vaulted ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
tall pointed-arch windows with intricate tracery allowing bright natural light to stream in
ornate iron chandelier hanging from ceiling with multiple candle holders
grey stone walls with dark wood paneling and shelving units
long wooden tables with benches where students are seated
large decorative blue patterned rug running down the center aisle
framed paintings and tapestries hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static third-person view of a grand gothic great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and tall arched windows illuminating the stone interior. Students sit at wooden tables on either side of a central aisle covered by an ornate blue rug, while the player character stands motionless in the middle facing away from the camera toward the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within a grand gothic great hall, emphasizing the stillness and scale of the environment. It begins with a static third-person view of the stone interior, where light streams through tall arched windows to illuminate high vaulted wooden ceilings. The camera captures students seated at wooden tables flanking a central aisle, which is marked by a long, ornate blue rug. The scene remains focused on the player character, who stands motionless in the center of the hall, facing away from the lens toward the distant far end of the room.
